# Agent instructions

Read these before making changes:

1. [assessment/HERMES_BUILD_PROMPT.md](assessment/HERMES_BUILD_PROMPT.md) — web app spec
2. [assessment/README.md](assessment/README.md) — Python pipeline
3. [assessment/templates/SECTION_MAP.md](assessment/templates/SECTION_MAP.md) — report template mapping

**Do not commit:** `.env`, legal PDFs, VPN configs, or `assessment/output/` generated files.
